name: Dominant vs. Dominated: Concept-Level Generative Collapse in Diffusion Models
summary: arXiv:2512.20666v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have attracted significant attention for their ability to generate diverse, high-fidelity images. However, i...
description: arXiv:2512.20666v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have attracted significant attention for their ability to generate diverse, high-fidelity images. However, in multi-concept generation, one concept token often dominates the output while others are suppressed-a phenomenon we term the Dominant-vs-Dominated (DvD) imbalance. To systematically study this failur...
author: Hayeon Jeong, Jong-Seok Lee
